sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54776" key="kataperai/wsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπεραί-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n54776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conclusion, close</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῆς λέξεως εἰς τέλειον</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
